\tzpentry{ID5755}{Modes Number Density Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5755 introduces Modes Number Density Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} N_{modes} = \frac{4\pi R^2}{\lambda^2} \cdot \frac{\Delta\omega}{\omega_0} \end{equation}
